ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ui_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UI component */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the UI component (e.g., meter, progressbar, scrollbar) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the UI component */,
  "aria_label" TEXT /* A descriptive label for the component, useful for screen readers */,
  "aria_describedby" TEXT /* ID of an element that provides a detailed description of the component */,
  "aria_valuemin" INTEGER /* Minimum value for components that have a range */,
  "aria_valuemax" INTEGER /* Maximum value for components that have a range */,
  "aria_valuenow" INTEGER /* Current value of the component */,
  "visual_properties" TEXT /* JSON string containing visual properties like color, size, and style */,
  "accessibility_guidelines" TEXT /* JSON string containing accessibility guidelines specific to the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, contributor, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the contribution */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UI component being contributed */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., new component, update, bug fix) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contribution (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the contribution */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was reviewed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contribution was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contribution was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UI component being used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the component was used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the component was used */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application where the component was used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_usage_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_usage_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., usage, contribution, analytics) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being granted the permission */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UI component the permission is for */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit, contribute) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was granted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES ui_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "application_description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id")
)
